name: Kibbee
recipeIngredient: 1 Leg of lamb (have fat and bone removed; ground fine twice) Approx. 4-5 pounds
1 cup Bulgur wheat; soaked for half hour in warm water
recipeInstructions:
1. Squish the bulgur wheat in your hands to remove excess water.
2. Mix all ingredients together well.
3. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed (it's okay if it remains raw).
4. Grease a large baking pan, at least 13x9 inches or larger.
5. Divide the meat into two layers on the pan.
6. Flatten each layer with your hands until even.
7. Add pine nuts to one layer.
8. Place the second layer of meat on top and flatten evenly.
9. Cut diagonal lines in both directions, not all the way through, creating a diamond pattern.
10. Dot the mixture well with butter or Crisco (more butter than Crisco), using about half a teaspoonful at a time, spreading it every couple of inches.
11. Bake for 1.5 hours at 350°F until browned.
